ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoolDude2349/Offline-HTML-Games-Pack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoolDude2349/Offline-HTML-Games-Pack
Language: html
300 offline HTML games, each on a single file

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ShubhangiRoy12/MooVit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ShubhangiRoy12/MooVit
Language: html
MooVit is a smart real-time safety assistant that helps visually impaired users by detecting people, vehicles, signals, and obstacles, and gives voice alerts to guide them safely in traffic and road environments. Designed for accessibility and easy use.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Sjj1024/PakePlus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Sjj1024/PakePlus
Language: html
Turn any webpage/HTML/Vue/React and so on into desktop and mobile app under 5M with easy in few minutes. 轻松将任意网站/HTML/Vue/React等项目构建为轻量级(小于5M)多端桌面应用和手机应用仅需几分钟. https://ppofficial.netlify.app

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Ylianst/MeshCentral
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Ylianst/MeshCentral
Language: html
A complete web-based remote monitoring and management web site. Once setup you can install agents and perform remote desktop session to devices on the local network or over the Internet.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: adongwanai/AgentGuide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/adongwanai/AgentGuide
Language: html
https://adongwanai.github.io/AgentGuide | AI Agent开发指南 | LangGraph实战 | 高级RAG | 转行大模型 | 大模型面试 | 算法工程师 | 面试题库 | 强化学习｜数据合成

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dhairyagothi/100_days_100_web_project
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dhairyagothi/100_days_100_web_project
Language: html
This repository contains 100 web projects from basic to intermediate using html css and js Please star the repo before start working on it

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nicobailon/visual-explainer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nicobailon/visual-explainer
Language: html
Agent skill that generates rich HTML pages or slide decks for diagrams, diff reviews, plan audits, data tables, and project recaps

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sonic-net/SONiC
ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: trycua/cua
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/trycua/cua
Language: html
Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents. Sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks to train and evaluate AI agents that can control full desktops (macOS, Linux, Windows).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wilsonfreitas/awesome-quant
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wilsonfreitas/awesome-quant
Language: html
A curated list of insanely awesome libraries, packages and resources for Quants (Quantitative Finance)
